name: evolve
description: >- Research-driven multi-cycle improvement director. Forms causal hypotheses about why scores are low, validates them with scout agents before attacking, dispatches axis-parallel fleet attacks, extracts transferable patterns, and runs indefinitely within a budget envelope. Accumulates a persistent belief model and pattern library across sessions.
author: SethGammon
summary_zh: 这是一个智能迭代优化控制器，能自动诊断表现不佳的原因，验证假设后执行针对性改进，并在预算内持续循环。它还会不断积累经验库，适合需要自动化持续调优和策略寻优的场景。
